speaker: speaker2
text: Hold on a second please . I'm sorry . He has gone out .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh.This is Paul.When will he be back ?

speaker: speaker2
text: He will be back at about seven o'clock .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can I leave a message please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Please tell him I'll call him at the office tomorrow afternoon .

speaker: speaker2
text: All right . I'll tell him when he comes back .
